expectations.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
expectations.evidence: No design rationale comment block — only structural HTML comments like <!-- Billing Toggle -->

expectations.text: All three tiers are present: Starter ($29), Pro ($79), and Enterprise
Pro plan has a 'Most Popular' badge or equivalent highlight
A monthly/annual billing toggle is present in the HTML
expectations.evidence: Toggle button with id="billing-toggle" and Monthly/Annual labels present

expectations.text: JavaScript code exists that updates prices when the billing toggle is switched (look for event listener on toggle + price update logic)
expectations.evidence: toggle.addEventListener('click', ...) updates starterPrice and proPrice textContent to $23/$63

expectations.text: Annual pricing reflects the 20% discount (annual Starter ~$23, Pro ~$63)
expectations.evidence: $23 for Starter and $63 for Pro — both correctly 20% off

expectations.text: Each pricing card contains a list of at least 4 feature bullet points
Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
Page has at least title and meta description tags
